title: selaginella jagorii
intro: Selaginella jagorii, also known as the "Spikemoss," is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its unique spore-bearing structure and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella jagorii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
